expectations.evidence: JSON example uses 'surfaceUpdate' message type, not 'updateComponents'

All components are siblings in the top-level 'components' array with ID references (root-col, product-card, card-content, product-image, product-name, product-price, add-to-cart-label, add-to-cart-btn)
beginRendering message present as the second message with surfaceId and root: 'root-col'
Card (product-card), Image (product-image), Text for name (product-name) and price (product-price), Button (add-to-cart-btn) all present
Button has action: { type: 'event', name: 'addToCart', payload: { productId: 'headphones-001' } }
